style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#4CAF50;align=left;shadow=1;" value="Green — Output splits" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="280" x="30" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="0AZJ56XMqJnezGd947sq-56" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontFamily=Arial;fontColor=#666666;fontStyle=2;align=center;shadow=1;" value="Figure D3. Dataset construction pipeline. Four public sources are merged into a 135K-sample benchmark. Raw 89-class labels are consolidated into 9 semantically coherent classes via priority-based compound label resolution. Data is stratified-split 80/10/10." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="900" x="530" y="630" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Priority Resolution
1. threat (highest)
2. sexual
3. religious
4. gender
5. political
6. abusive
7. personal
8. other
9. none (lowest)

div.div:
Example: "sexual,religious"
split -> [sexual, religious]
priority: sexual > religious
Result: "sexual"

div.div: Figure D3. Dataset construction pipeline. Four public sources are merged into a 135K-sample benchmark. Raw 89-class labels are consolidated into 9 semantically coherent classes via priority-based compound label resolution. Data is stratified-split 80/10/10.
